items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of the persona scenario where the emergency slot is blocked. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the functionality of blocking an emergency slot. As a result, it is unclear whether the expected behavior is supported or if it produces a failure report, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
